projects.title: Discover our Projects
services.title: Services we provide
aboutUs.profileDesc1: Ever Zone Construction and Decoration Company Limited is owned construction companies in Myanmar. Established in 2018 Ever Zone Construction has over Five years of service to Myanmar Construction the company's commitment, expertise and integrity in construction.
aboutUs.profileDesc2: Projects undertaken by Ever Zone extend across all market sectors and range from residential and luxury building.
aboutUs.boardTitle: Board of directors and key management
aboutUs.boardDesc1: The Managing Director, U Naing Wai Lin, who was graduated in Myanmar.
aboutUs.boardDesc2: has experienced in the field of administration, lecturing, project management, construction quality management for 17 years. He has 10 years-experience as Construction Management in Singapore and 7 years-experience in Myanmar.
aboutUs.boardDesc3: All Board of Directors work closely with the various General Managers and partnering companies to continually manage and expand the Ever Zone Construction and Decoration Company Limited's business into new era as a vibrant, contemporary, forward thinking company that maintains respect for traditional values and its proud heritage. The Board of Ever Zone Ltd comprises three Executive Directors and one non-Executive Director providing a balance of general corporate and management experience together with superior construction industry and financial expertise.
aboutUs.vision: Our Vision is to achieve cost leadership in the construction market and to become a full-fledged construction contractor.
aboutUs.mission: Our Mission is to develop properties and operate the business to exceed our clients.
contactUs.location: Block (C) - Room No. 202, Anawyahta Housing, Kamayut Township, Yangon
